commands.review_summary:
The PR detects Feishu interactive-card JSON supplied as plain `message` or `text` for proactive send and thread-reply actions, routes valid cards through the existing card sender, and adds Feishu channel regression coverage plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection. The linked issue gives a concrete payload, and current main routes plain `message` JSON to `sendMessageFeishu` rather than the interactive-card sender; I did not run live Feishu delivery in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: A human maintainer needs to decide whether to require live Feishu proof, accept a narrower harness transcript, or apply a proof override; automation cannot supply the contributor's real setup evidence.

target.title: fix(feishu): detect card JSON in plain message param for proactive sends (#53486)
